steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.

steps.title: Master mix is created in an...
steps.instruction: Master mix is created in an empty tube through combining 15.5ul nanopure H2O, 5ul MyTaq Reaction Buffer, 10ul primer mix, and 0.25ul MyTaq DNA Polymerase per sample. Although 24 samples are being processed, 28 samples-worth of master mix is created to ensure sufficient volume. The contents of the tube are mixed after the final transfer to ensure homogeneity.

steps.title: Each sample of the chip is...
steps.instruction: Each sample of the chip is transferred to the the PCR strips. Each of the 3 rows of the chip is transferred to a new PCR strip (strips 1-3). Samples moving across the row to the right move down the strip.
21.75ul of master mix from step 6 is transferred to each well of PCR strips 4-6.

steps.title: 3ul of each sample from strips...
steps.instruction: 3ul of each sample from strips 1-3 is transferred to its corresponding well in strips 4-6 (strip 1 well 1 to strip 4 well 1, strip 1 well 2 to strip 4 well 2, etc.). The contents of the destination well are mixed 10x after the transfer.
